hubs.name: HUB_ACTOR
hubs.description: The HUB_ACTOR entity represents a single actor, holding their unique identifier and serving as a central reference point for all related data.

hubs.name: HUB_ADDRESS
hubs.description: The HUB_ADDRESS entity represents a collection of unique geographical addresses, storing key information about each location.

column_descriptions.address_id: The unique identifier of the address record

hubs.name: HUB_CATEGORY
hubs.description: The HUB_CATEGORY entity represents a list of unique categories in the business, providing a centralized reference point for categorizing and organizing data.

hubs.name: HUB_CITY
hubs.description: This Data Vault hub represents a city, providing a centralized location for city data and enabling the business to maintain accurate and consistent city information across different systems.

hubs.name: HUB_COUNTRY
hubs.description: This hub represents a list of countries, storing their unique identifiers and providing a centralized location for country data.

hubs.name: HUB_CUSTOMER
hubs.description: This hub represents a customer entity with their unique identifier.

hubs.name: HUB_FILM
hubs.description: This Data Vault hub represents a unique film, identified by its film ID, and serves as a central point for linking various film-related data.

column_descriptions.film_id: A unique identifier for the film.

hubs.name: HUB_INVENTORY
hubs.description: This Data Vault entity represents the unique identifiers of inventory records, which are used to track film stock levels across various stores.

column_descriptions.inventory_id: The unique identifier of the inventory record.

hubs.name: HUB_LANGUAGE
hubs.description: The HUB_LANGUAGE entity represents a list of languages in the business, storing unique identifiers for each language and providing a centralized location for language data.

hubs.name: HUB_PAYMENT
hubs.description: The HUB_PAYMENT entity represents a collection of unique payment transactions made by customers, serving as a central reference point for tracking and managing payments.

column_descriptions.payment_id: Unique identifier for the payment transaction.

hubs.name: HUB_RENTAL
hubs.description: This entity represents rental transactions, capturing key information about each rental.

column_descriptions.rental_id: Unique identifier for the rental transaction.

hubs.name: HUB_STAFF
hubs.description: The HUB_STAFF entity represents a staff member, uniquely identified and linked to other relevant information across the business.

column_descriptions.staff_id: Unique identifier for each staff member

hubs.name: HUB_STORE
hubs.description: This Data Vault hub represents a store entity, which is a central location where products are sold, with its associated manager and address information.

links.name: LNK_ADDRESS_CITY
links.description: This link represents the relationship between addresses and cities, connecting the address and city hubs to provide a centralized view of location data.

links.name: LNK_CITY_COUNTRY
links.description: This link represents the relationship between cities and countries, connecting the city and country hubs to provide a centralized location for city data and enable standardized and up-to-date city data for various business applications.

links.name: LNK_CUSTOMER_STORE
links.description: This link represents the relationship between a customer and a store, providing a connection point for analysis and reporting.

links.name: LNK_CUSTOMER_ADDRESS
links.description: This link represents the relationship between a customer and their address, connecting the customer and address entities.

links.name: LNK_FILM_LANGUAGE
links.description: This link represents the relationship between films and their corresponding languages.

links.name: LNK_FILM_ACTOR
links.description: This Data Vault link represents the many-to-many relationship between actors and films, connecting the two entities to enable analysis and querying of film and actor combinations.

links.name: LNK_FILM_CATEGORY
links.description: This link represents the relationship between films and their respective categories, providing a way to connect and analyze these entities.

links.name: LNK_INVENTORY_FILM
links.description: This link represents the relationships between inventory and film entities, connecting the hubs that store information about films and inventory levels.

links.name: LNK_INVENTORY_STORE
links.description: This link represents the relationship between films and stores in the inventory management system, tracking the connection between specific films and the stores where they are stocked.

links.name: LNK_PAYMENT_CUSTOMER
links.description: This link represents the relationship between payments and customers, connecting the HUB_PAYMENT and HUB_CUSTOMER entities.

links.name: LNK_PAYMENT_STAFF
links.description: This link represents relationships between payments and staff, linking payment transactions to the staff members involved.

links.name: LNK_PAYMENT_RENTAL
links.description: This link represents the relationship between payments and rentals, connecting the payment transactions with the associated rentals.

links.name: LNK_RENTAL_INVENTORY
links.description: This link represents the many-to-many relationship between rental transactions and the items that were rented, providing a connection between the HUB_RENTAL and HUB_INVENTORY entities.

links.name: LNK_RENTAL_CUSTOMER
links.description: This link represents relationships between rental transactions, capturing connections between customers and the items they rented.

links.name: LNK_RENTAL_STAFF
links.description: This link represents the relationship between rental transactions and the staff involved, capturing the connections between staff members and the rentals they have managed.

links.name: LNK_STAFF_STORE
links.description: This link represents the many-to-many relationship between staff members and the stores where they are assigned, providing a connection point for analyzing staff assignments and store operations.

links.name: LNK_STORE_STAFF
links.description: This link represents the relationship between a store and its staff, providing a connection between the store entity and the staff entity.

links.name: LNK_STORE_ADDRESS
links.description: This link represents the relationship between a store and its address, connecting the store and address hubs in the Data Vault model.

satellites.name: SAT_ACTOR_CORE
satellites.description: The SAT_ACTOR_CORE satellite stores changes to actor information, including first and last names, over time.

satellites.name: SAT_ADDRESS_CORE
satellites.description: The SAT_ADDRESS_CORE satellite captures detailed information about geographical addresses, including street addresses, postal codes, and phone numbers, which are used to support business operations such as customer management and logistics.

column_descriptions.address: The primary street address of a location.
column_descriptions.address2: An additional address line for a location, often used for apartment or suite numbers.
column_descriptions.district: The district or region where a location is situated.
column_descriptions.postal_code: The postal code associated with a location, used for mail and package delivery.
column_descriptions.phone: The phone number associated with a location, often used for contact purposes.

satellites.name: SAT_CATEGORY_CORE
satellites.description: This satellite table stores the core details of each category, including its name and any changes made to this information over time.

column_descriptions.name: The name or description of the category.

satellites.name: SAT_CITY_CORE
satellites.description: This satellite, SAT_CITY_CORE, represents the core details of cities in the Data Vault model, specifically the city names and their associated changes over time.

satellites.name: SAT_COUNTRY_CORE
satellites.description: This satellite represents the core attributes of a country, storing its name and other relevant details. It provides a centralized location for country data and ensures data consistency across different systems.

satellites.name: SAT_CUSTOMER_CORE
satellites.description: The SAT_CUSTOMER_CORE satellite contains the core customer details, including names and contact information. It provides a centralized view of customer data for customer relationship management, sales, and marketing purposes.

column_descriptions.activebool: Indicator of whether the customer is active or not
column_descriptions.active: Indicator of whether the customer is active or not

satellites.name: SAT_FILM_CORE
satellites.description: This satellite represents additional details about films, supporting the management of film inventory and rental operations.

column_descriptions.title: The title of the film
column_descriptions.description: A brief summary of the film's content
column_descriptions.release_year: The year the film was released
column_descriptions.special_features: Any special features or attributes of the film
column_descriptions.fulltext: The full text of the film's description or other relevant information

satellites.name: SAT_FILM_PRICING
satellites.description: The SAT_FILM_PRICING satellite represents film pricing and rental information, tracking changes to rental duration, rate, and replacement cost over time.

column_descriptions.rental_duration: The maximum number of days a film can be rented.
column_descriptions.rental_rate: The cost to rent a film.
column_descriptions.replacement_cost: The cost to replace a film copy.

satellites.name: SAT_INVENTORY
satellites.description: This satellite represents the history of changes to inventory levels of films at various stores, tracking when the data was last updated.

column_descriptions.last_update: The timestamp of the last update to the inventory record.

satellites.name: SAT_LANGUAGE_CORE
satellites.description: The SAT_LANGUAGE_CORE satellite stores additional details about each language, including its name, and tracks when these details were last updated.

column_descriptions.name: The actual name of the language.

satellites.name: SAT_PAYMENT_CORE
satellites.description: This satellite represents the core attributes of payment transactions, including the payment date and other relevant details.

column_descriptions.payment_date: The date and time the payment was made.

satellites.name: SAT_PAYMENT_PRICING
satellites.description: The SAT_PAYMENT_PRICING satellite contains the details of payment transactions made by customers, including pricing information. It supports the HUB_PAYMENT entity by providing additional context about each payment.

column_descriptions.amount: The amount of the payment made by the customer.

satellites.name: SAT_RENTAL_CORE
satellites.description: This satellite represents the core details of rental transactions, capturing key dates and events associated with each rental. It provides a record of rental transactions, enabling the business to track and analyze inventory usage, customer behavior, and staff performance.

column_descriptions.rental_date: The date and time when the rental occurred
column_descriptions.return_date: The date and time when the rented item was returned

satellites.name: SAT_STAFF_CORE
satellites.description: This satellite entity, SAT_STAFF_CORE, contains the core details about staff members, including their personal and employment information, as sourced from the silver.silver_staff table.

column_descriptions.email: The staff member's email address for contact purposes.
column_descriptions.username: The staff member's username for system access.
column_descriptions.active: Indicates whether the staff member is currently active or inactive.

satellites.name: SAT_STORE
satellites.description: This satellite represents the historical changes made to store information, tracking updates to the store entity over time.

column_descriptions.last_update: Timestamp of the last update made to the store information

satellites.name: SAT_FILM_DETAILS
satellites.description: This satellite represents additional details about films, including their titles, descriptions, and rental information, which supports the management of film inventory and rental operations.

column_descriptions.title: The title of the film
column_descriptions.description: A brief summary of the film
column_descriptions.release_year: The year the film was released
column_descriptions.language_id: The language in which the film is produced
column_descriptions.rental_duration: The maximum duration for which the film can be rented
column_descriptions.rental_rate: The cost to rent the film
column_descriptions.replacement_cost: The cost to replace the film

satellites.name: SAT_FILM_CATEGORY
satellites.description: This satellite represents the historical information about film categories, storing when these relationships were last updated or inserted. It provides a link between films and their respective categories, supporting business intelligence and analytics.

column_descriptions.category_id: The identifier of the category assigned to the film

satellites.name: SAT_RENTAL_DETAILS
satellites.description: This satellite captures the details of rental transactions, including when items were rented and returned, and which staff member handled the transaction.

column_descriptions.rental_date: Date and time when the rental occurred
column_descriptions.return_date: Date and time when the rented item was returned
column_descriptions.staff_id: Identifier for the staff member who handled the rental transaction

satellites.name: SAT_CUSTOMER_DETAILS
satellites.description: This satellite entity stores the details of a customer, including their name, email, and address, providing a centralized view of customer data.

column_descriptions.address_id: The identifier for the customer's address.

satellites.name: SAT_STAFF_DETAILS
satellites.description: This satellite table stores additional details about staff members, including their personal and employment information, and is used to support staff management and store operations.

column_descriptions.email: The staff member's email address for contact purposes.
column_descriptions.address_id: The identifier of the staff member's address.
